author: marcopolo__
content: Hey folks, I won’t be able to make today’s meeting. But I expect to make future ones. Could someone please take notes so I can review later?

author: marcopolo__
content: If someone else wants to drive this meeting feel free, but we could also exchange notes async.

author: sukunrt
content:
I can take notes / drive. But i would prefer to move it to next week unless people have something pressing to discuss. 

The thing on my mind is the has blobs api and the corresponding changes. Do people want to discuss that on a call today?

author: __kasey__
content: I was in the meeting waiting on the host for a minute but no one else was around. Maybe we just push to next week. FYI Aarsh has [a pr](https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/pull/16774) up for using hasBlobs to accelerate the initial bitmap determination.

author: __kasey__
content: We also discussed using hasBlobs (if available) whether or not partial messages is enabled. We can use it in the loop where we keep polling the EL if the initial getBlobsV2 fails (or v3 fails to return all cells). The assumption being that this call is a lot cheaper, so we can avoid wasted resources/time when the set of blobs in the EL hasn't changed.

author: aarshshahoffchain
content:
Hey Folks,

I'll be out from tomorrow to 24th May. See you'll when I'm back. In the meantime, we're gonna work on getting one last review for the partial cells works in the prysm team and we can then merge that work into our develop branch.
